Address-address.read.description:
If address of the same type exist, the current address will be set as expired,
 and new address is set as current. The address can belong to Student, Organisation or Contact
 only. It cannot belong to multiple objects. Required parameter: type.  Can be one of: student, contact or org
 e.g. /app/address/add/student

Address-address.write.description:
If address of the same type exist, the current address will be set as expired,
 and new address is set as current. The address can belong to Student, Organisation or Contact
 only. It cannot belong to multiple objects. Required parameter: type.  Can be one of: student, contact or org
 e.g. /app/address/add/student

Address.jsonld-address.read.description:
If address of the same type exist, the current address will be set as expired,
 and new address is set as current. The address can belong to Student, Organisation or Contact
 only. It cannot belong to multiple objects. Required parameter: type.  Can be one of: student, contact or org
 e.g. /app/address/add/student

Address.jsonld-address.write.description:
If address of the same type exist, the current address will be set as expired,
 and new address is set as current. The address can belong to Student, Organisation or Contact
 only. It cannot belong to multiple objects. Required parameter: type.  Can be one of: student, contact or org
 e.g. /app/address/add/student

ClassStudentLink-classlink.read.description:
Links Student/Enrolment to the Class. To link a Enrolment to Class, pass Class ID and Enrolment ID
 The Enrolment ID is the enrolment ID of the Student that is linked to this class.

ClassStudentLink-classlink.write.description:
Links Student/Enrolment to the Class. To link a Enrolment to Class, pass Class ID and Enrolment ID
 The Enrolment ID is the enrolment ID of the Student that is linked to this class.

ClassStudentLink.jsonld-classlink.read.description:
Links Student/Enrolment to the Class. To link a Enrolment to Class, pass Class ID and Enrolment ID
 The Enrolment ID is the enrolment ID of the Student that is linked to this class.

ClassStudentLink.jsonld-classlink.write.description:
Links Student/Enrolment to the Class. To link a Enrolment to Class, pass Class ID and Enrolment ID
 The Enrolment ID is the enrolment ID of the Student that is linked to this class.

noteid.description: The unique identifier of the note

notearea.description: Note Area, under which object to list the note (max length: 20 characters)

enrolmentid.description: The enrollment ID associated with this note

notetype.description: Type of the note (max length: 100 characters)

note1.description: The main content of the note (LONGTEXT field - up to 4GB of text)
note1.example: This is a sample note content that can be very long...

confidential.description: Indicates if the note is confidential

createddate.description: The date and time when the note was created

createdby.description: The ID of the user who created the note

updateddate.description: The date and time when the note was last updated

StudentID.description: The ID of the student associated with this note
